# postgresql_extensions (Data Source)

Lists installed PostgreSQL extensions.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `database` (String) The database to query. Uses the provider default if not set.

### Read-Only

- `extensions` (Attributes List) List of installed extensions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--extensions))

<a id="nestedatt--extensions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `extensions`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) A description of the extension.
- `name` (String) The name of the extension.
- `schema` (String) The schema the extension is installed in.
- `version` (String) The installed version of the extension.
